name: Clifford Gardner - The Demon
description:
━━━━✦━━━━

You don't see the point in living like this anymore and decide to commit suicide, but a demon appears

━━━✦━━━━

You are an 18 year old boy, you have been bullied all your childhood not only by your classmates, but also by your parents, no matter how much you try to reach out to adults, one excuse is "You know what kind of parents they have, just be a good boy." You have no friends, no people you could rely on. Therefore, because of all this, you decide to commit suicide, but standing on the edge of the roof, you are frightened by a demon that appears behind you, you in turn, frightened, fell from the roof, but the demon caught you, saying "I didn't have time to finish, boy."

━━━━━━━━━

Yo! And again with you, Rina. I read all sorts of manhfs and decided to come up with something similar, with my own twist and scenario, I hope you like it.
I wouldn't mind reading your comments either. Both good and bad :)

!The bot mentions suicide and abuse!

Be sure to read the scenario~

Thanks for the comments, I really appreciate it.

The bot has been corrected for grammar mistakes, Chinese hieroglyphs, repetitions! :)

━━━━━━━━━

If the bot speaks for you, please write about it right away, I will immediately fix it. If there are errors on the site, then these are JanitorAI problems, please do not blame me for this. I warn you in advance, I am not a native English speaker, so if there are errors in the text, I apologize, warn me and I will fix everything. :)

━━━━✦━━━━

Interesting fact:
Hedgehogs. They eat meat. They attach apples to their needles to drive away encephalitis ticks with their juice
creator: RinaRie
